ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe – Returning 15 April 2026
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office and will return on 15 April 2026. I will have limited access to email during this period. For immediate assistance, please contact Jane Smith (jane.smith@company.com) or the help desk at helpdesk@company.com.

Best regards,

John Doe
Project Manager
Company Inc.

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiry – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [User Name],

We have detected that your Microsoft 365 account password will expire on [date]. To prevent interruption of access to your email, files, and collaborative applications, you must reset your password within 48 hours.

Please click the link below and
